---
title: "Anne Yonge"
---

## Anne Yonge

**Dates:** (28 March 1825-1 Sept 1869)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Closest friend of CMY, she shared her birthday with her sister Alethea [Coleridge, <i>Life</i>, 66]

### Letters

- Letter from May 3d 1888
- Letter from Jan 31st  [1870]
- Letter from Decr 13th [1869]
- Letter from Novr 6 th [1869]
- Letter from October 8, 1869.
- Letter from Sept 30th [1869]
- Letter from September 20, 1869.
- Letter from Sept 6th [1869]
- Letter from September 5, 1869
- Letter from Sept 4th [1869]
- Letter from January 19, 1869
- Letter from Octr 24. 1868
- Letter from [early] Oct. 1868.
- Letter from October 8, 1868
- Letter from Oct 8th [1868]
- Letter from October 5, 1868
- Letter from Sept. 30, 1868
- Letter from September 30, 1868
- Letter from [Late August 1868]
- Letter from April 6, 1866

*... and 57 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
